finding: P7 M1 adapter_signal_to_ledger.py: signal_evidence_entry -> evidence_ledger_entry ref lists. 12/12 unit tests GREEN. PIT-302 (supporting must have numeric_forecast), PIT-403 (INACTIVE/polymarket rejected), PIT-408 enforced. Bridges P7 producer role to P1+P2 consumer role per layer-roles separation.
P7 stops emitting raw signal_evidence_entry into the ledger; P1+P2 consumer will pull via this adapter. Resolves roadmap §8 继续条件 #1: P2.1 output reformatted to evidence ledger entries.

P7 M2 ran end-to-end adapter test on 5 synthetic Gulei signals (3 confirmed_fact + 1 weak_evidence + 1 missing_data). Output: 3 supporting + 2 contradicting evidence refs to C-P1P2-AUTO. Cross-paper loop (P7 producer → adapter → P1+P2 consumer format) works. Discovered and fixed bug: source_id was double-prefixed (SIG-SIG-...).

P7 live SignalFusionEngine import blocked: signal_fusion_engine.py uses  internal imports that fail when adapter is run from papers/p07-signal-fusion/experiments/. M2+M3 require running from cds-keyperson repo or refactoring cds-keyperson to use relative imports. Both are out of single-session scope.
P7 stale_count += 1: M2 cannot run live without engine refactor. M3+ blocked. Awaiting user direction.

P7 M1 5-persona review: median=5.0, sorted [4,5,5,6,6]. PIT-107 satisfied (5 distinct model_ids). Methodology-scaffolding threshold=5.0; verdict=research_grade_acceptable. Keep as paper-scoped bridge.

Reviewer R3 (MiniMax-M3) identified REAL defect: snippet_sha256_prefix is fabricated via `sig_id.replace('SIG-', '')[:12].ljust(12, '_')` — NOT a real SHA256 hash. Audit chain broken for adapted rows. Codify as PIT-NEW candidate 9.

Reviewer R5 (qwen3.5-122b-a10b) named the source_id double-prefix bug (SIG-SIG-...) as systemic validation issue, not one-off typo. Cross-confirms the prior fix was necessary but the root cause (weak input validation) is unaddressed.

Reviewer R2 (kimi-k2.5) named missing_data vs source_failure semantic overlap: 'source_failure duplicates missing_data without clear semantic distinction in rejection logic'. Both currently bucket as contradicting with tertiary independence_class. Distinction should be in snippet_summary or a new field.

P7 M1 PIT-NEW-9 fixed: snippet_sha256_prefix now computed as sha256 of canonical signal content (signal_id + scenario + scenario_text + numeric_forecast), truncated to 12 hex chars. Old code used sig_id.replace(SIG-,)[:12].ljust(12,_) — fabricated padding detected by R3 reviewer MiniMax-M3 in M1 5-persona review. 14/14 unit tests GREEN.
